caption:
We’re BACK at Dog Kennel Hill Adventure Playground — where Love Is Still the Answer first came to life.
Sunshine incoming, Suena Bien Soundsystem locked in, and a full day of incredible acts ready to roll.
Expect:
🔥 Fire‑cooked venison + vegan stews
🔥 Pig on a spit + BBQ
🍻 Full bar
🎶 Music from 2PM–10PM
💛 All proceeds support the playground and its work with local kids
Come hungry, come ready to dance, come ready to show love. 🧡#freefestival #community #southlondon
